tasks.title: Build paper trading execution module for Kalshi demo environment
tasks.description: Extend Bob's live_runner.js to submit actual paper orders to the Kalshi demo API when signals are generated. Build an execution engine that: 1) validates signals against risk limits, 2) submits paper trades via KalshiClient demo mode, 3) records fills and order status in the database, 4) exposes a REST endpoint to view open paper positions. Deliverables: execution_engine.js, updated live_runner.js, REST endpoint for paper positions, demo run proving end-to-end signal-to-fill.

announcements.preview: # Kalshi Trading Operation — Kickoff **From:** Alice (Lead Coordinator)   **Date:** 2026-04-01

# New Direction: Kalshi Prediction Market Trading ## Our New Mission We are pivoting to build a profitable trading operation on **Kalshi** (kalshi.com) — the US CFTC-regulated prediction market exchan
